function.name: health_read_measurements
function.description: Read person medical records for a specified past date -- there is no reason to provide dates from the future.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

date.description: the past date we want to retrieve the medical records, in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2026-03-24

function.name: health_save_blood
function.description: Save person blood pressure and cardiac pulse to medical database. Also compute pulse pressure as difference between systolic and diastolic pressures.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

systole.description: systolic pressure expressed as mmHg (millimeters of mercury).

diastole.description: diastolic pressure expressed as mmHg (millimeters of mercury).

pulse.description: heart rate expressed in bpm (beats per minute).

function.name: health_save_glucose
function.description: Save person blood glucose level to medical database.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

glucose.description: blood glucose level expressed in mg/dL (milligrams per deciliter).

function.name: health_save_temperature
function.description: Save person body temperature to medical database.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.

function.name: health_save_weight
function.description: Save person body weight to medical database. Also compute body mass index based on person height.

person.description: human-readable person name, unique per medical database.
